member.name: T:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Container.GvContainerZk
member.summary: Zero-knowledge encrypted container format. Stores multiple files with per-entry DEKs wrapped by a container encryption key (CEK) derived from the master key.

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Container.GvContainerZk.AddFile(System.String,System.Byte[],GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Models.EngineOptions,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a file to the container using streaming to avoid loading the entire file into memory.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.ByteArray
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.AadPreview
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.HeaderDocDto
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.CipherSuite
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.KdfParams
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.Int32
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.GvZkJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Primitives.Aead.CreateAesGcm(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates an AesGcm instance for reuse across multiple encrypt/decrypt calls. Caller is responsible for disposing the instance.

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Primitives.Aead.CreateXChaChaKey(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates an NSec Key instance for reuse across multiple XChaCha20 calls. Caller is responsible for disposing the instance.

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Primitives.Aead.EncryptWithAesGcm(System.Security.Cryptography.AesGcm,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encrypts using a pre-created AesGcm instance (for AES-256-GCM).

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Primitives.Aead.EncryptWithKey(NSec.Cryptography.Key,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encrypts using a pre-created NSec Key instance (for XChaCha20-Poly1305).

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Primitives.Aead.DecryptWithAesGcm(System.Security.Cryptography.AesGcm,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decrypts using a pre-created AesGcm instance (for AES-256-GCM).

member.name: M:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Primitives.Aead.DecryptWithKey(NSec.Cryptography.Key,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decrypts using a pre-created NSec Key instance (for XChaCha20-Poly1305).

member.name: T:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Util.KeyProtector.FileKeyProtector
member.summary: Prototype file-backed key protector for non-Windows platforms. It stores a random envelope key in a file under the application's data folder and uses AES-GCM to wrap/unwrap small secrets. This is provided as a pragmatic fallback for platforms without DPAPI.

member.name: T:GiblexVault.Security.ZK.Util.KeyProtector.IKeyProtector
member.summary: Abstraction for sealing/unsealing small secrets. Implementations may use platform-provided secure storage (DPAPI) or an application managed envelope. This is a prototype abstraction to enable cross-platform sealing strategies.
